examples: After his workout he eats a salad Rhoda has prepared for him.
A commanders salary was modest, and Rhoda was used to this better life.
Rhoda has moved in with Jim, the local dentist, and is dreaming of a beach wedding in Hawaii.
Even the prescription painkillers Rhoda steals from the vet's practice do nothing to alleviate her suffering.
Labour MSP Rhoda Grant highlighted the need for further examination of building standards and insulation.
